texts.name: Silvanne
texts.biography: Silvanne commands not armies, but the forest itself. In her presence, Dryads gather in restless circles and Sylvan Dryads awaken with renewed strength, answering a call older than memory. Those who underestimate her understand too late: near Silvanne, the forest is never indifferent.

specialty.description:
{Dryads and Sylvan Dryads}

Increases the Speed of Dryads and Sylvan Dryads by 1, and their Attack and Defense by 5% for every 4 hero levels (rounded up).
specialty.name: Dryads
